warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.desc: Melee powerhouse. Stamina-fueled charge attacks, AoE strikes, and group invincibility.
warrior.passive: Sprint stamina system: fills via parries, dodges, blocks. Perfect actions grant bonus.

mage.name: Mage
mage.desc: Arcane caster. Teleport blocks, elemental mastery, and devastating spell combos.
mage.passive: Creates particle teleport blocks (max 10). Placeable by AI companions, breakable by factions.

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.desc: Precision striker. Parry-counter combos, ranged mastery, and swift dash attacks.
ranger.passive: RMB+LMB parry: perfect parry → 0.5s stun → instant dash attack (2s window).

worge.name: Worge
worge.desc: Shapeshifter. Three forms: Bear (tank), Raptor (stealth), Large Bird (flight).
worge.passive: Form shifting — Bear: power + tank. Raptor: invisible rogue. Bird: flyable mount.

bear.name: Bear Form
bear.desc: Large and powerful — tank form. High HP, high defense, AoE taunt.

warbear.name: Warbear Form (Lv20)
warbear.desc: Ultimate bear form — 3x HP, massive size, raid-boss tanking. Level 20 class skill.

raptor.name: Raptor Form
raptor.desc: Invisible rogue — stealth, backstab, bleed. Fast and deadly.

bird.name: Large Bird Form
bird.desc: Flyable mount — carry allies, aerial combat, dive bomb.

skills.name: Cleave

skills.desc: Spin attack hitting all nearby enemies

skills.desc: Rush to target, stunning 1s

skills.desc: Dual-wield two-handed weapons. Ultimate.

skills.desc: Mana-powered shield absorbing all damage
